title: Unit Selection & Movement
label: Devlog 03
alt: Unit selection and grid movement prototype
summary: Units can now be selected and moved across the grid. This establishes the foundation for turn flow, pathing, and future combat interactions.

title: Cursor & Units
label: Devlog 02
alt: Early Veilkeeper tactical cursor prototype showing a grid highlight in a Godot debug scene.
summary: Grid highlight now supports mouse, keyboard, and controller. Units on the board. Interaction next.

title: Combat Foundations
label: Devlog 01
summary: The combat core baseline took shape with the grid, tactical framing, and the first pass at the systems Veilkeeper will build outward from.
